tags.query:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 
            FROM ChemicalData 
            WHERE ChargeNumber = {[.]../Charge/Number}
              AND Current_Level <> 0
        )
        THEN 1
        ELSE 0
    END
tags.documentation: Select if a mix is in db ChemicalData, exclude charge number sets with all zeroes (empty mix data)
tags.name: Loaded Charge Mixed

tags.query:
SELECT Material.ItemNumber, Material.ItemCode, Material.ItemDesc, Material.PackSize, 
   Material.Pieces, Material.LengthCode, Material.BoardFt, Material.CubicFt, Material.Mill, 
   Material.Standard, Material.Retreat
FROM Material
INNER JOIN Charges ON Material.ChargeID = Charges.ChargeID
WHERE Charges.ChargeNumber = {[.]Number}
tags.name: Material w Retreat

tags.expression:
if ({[.]../../Edge/Control/Step} >= 6,		//If step is before empty, this isn't used
	{[.]../Injection},				//live injection reading
	0
)
tags.name: Net Inj

tags.expression:
if ({[.]../../Edge/Control/Step} >= 6,									//If step is before empty, this isn't used
	if ({[.]../Treat By} = 0,				//Treat by Tally
		{[.]KB Active} * {[.]../Cubic Ft},	//kickback
		{[.]KB Active} * {[.]../Calc Cubic Ft}						//Treat by Computer or Flood
	),
	0
)
tags.name: KB

tags.expression:
if ({[.]../../Edge/Control/Step} >= 6,							//If step is before empty, this isn't used
	{[.]KB Gal} * {[.]../Density},	//converting kbGal to lbs
	0
)
tags.name: KB Lbs

tags.expression:
if({[.]../../Edge/Control/Step} >= 6,	// If step is 6 or greater
    tag("[.]../../Edge/Work Tanks/Mix System " + {[.]../Selected Mix System} + " Mix Tank " + {[.]../Work Tank} + " Volume"), // Current tank volume
    0  // Else, return 0
)
tags.name: Net Gal In Tank

tags.expression:
if ({[.]../../Edge/Control/Step} >= 6,												//If step is before empty, this isn't used
	({[.]../Active Chem As Mixed} /100) * {[.]Net Lbs Sol},	//active solution percent in tank
	0
)
tags.name: Net Act Lbs At As Mixed Per

tags.expression:
if ({[.]../../Edge/Control/Step} >= 6,			//If step is before empty, this isn't used
	{[.]Gross Inj} - {[.]Net Inj},			//difference in injections (pressure and live)
	0
)
tags.name: KB Gal

tags.expression:
if ({[.]../../Edge/Control/Step} >= 6,							//If step is before empty, this isn't used
	{[.]Net Act Lbs At As Mixed Per} - {[.]Lbs Stripped},		//finished lbs in tank accounting for stripping
	0
)
tags.name: Finish Lbs In Tank

tags.expression:
if ({[.]../../Treat/Step} >= 6,										//If step is before empty, this isn't used
	{[.]../Active Recipe[15,3]},	//injection at completion of pressure step
	0
)
tags.name: Gross Inj
Finish Lbs Sol

tags.expression:
if ({[.]../../Edge/Control/Step} >= 6,											//If step is before empty, this isn't used
	{[.]KB Lbs} * ({[.]../Active Chem As Mixed} /100),	//Active percent of kb
	0
)

	{[.]Net Gal In Tank} * {[.]../Density},		//Current tank volume converted to lbs

tags.documentation: This queries the plant DB to find the max board length for the current charge and cylinder based on the custom property CylinderNum.
tags.name: Max Length

tags.query:
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(Material.BoardFt * Material.Pieces), 0) AS TotalBoardFtSum
FROM Charges
INNER JOIN Material ON Material.ChargeID = Charges.ChargeID
WHERE CAST(Charges.ChargeDateTime AS DATE) = CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
   AND Charges.Cylinder = {[.]../Charge/Cylinder};
tags.documentation: This queries the plant DB to find all of the charges for the day for the cylinder based on the custom property CylinderNum. This query returns 0 at midnight.
tags.name: Daily BF

tags.expression:
IF({[.]../Charge/Loaded Charge Mixed},'Mixed',
IF({[.]../Charge/Loaded Charge Mixing},'Mixing','Not Mixed'))

tags.expression:
case({[.]../Edge/Control/Step}, 
    0, "IDLE", 
    1, "INITIAL VACUUM", 
    2, "FILL", 
    3, "RAISE PRESSURE",
    4, "PRESSURE",
    5, "PRESSURE RELIEF",
    6, "EMPTY",
    7, "FINAL VACUUM",
    8, "FINAL EMPTY",
    9, "FINISH",
    "Unknown")

	-- Step 6 Start Time
	CONVERT(VARCHAR, DATEADD(
		SECOND,
		CASE WHEN CHARINDEX(':', ISNULL(Step1Time, '00:00')) > 0 THEN 
			(LEFT(ISNULL(Step1Time, '00:00'), CHARINDEX(':', ISNULL(Step1Time, '00:00')) - 1) * 60) +

		ELSE 0 END +

			RIGHT(ISNULL(Step3Time, '00:00'), LEN(ISNULL(Step3Time, '00:00')) - CHARINDEX(':', ISNULL(Step3Time, '00:00')))
		ELSE 0 END +
		CASE WHEN CHARINDEX(':', ISNULL(Step4Time, '00:00')) > 0 THEN 
			(LEFT(ISNULL(Step4Time, '00:00'), CHARINDEX(':', ISNULL(Step4Time, '00:00')) - 1) * 60) + 
			RIGHT(ISNULL(Step4Time, '00:00'), LEN(ISNULL(Step4Time, '00:00')) - CHARINDEX(':', ISNULL(Step4Time, '00:00')))
		ELSE 0 END +
		CASE WHEN CHARINDEX(':', ISNULL(Step5Time, '00:00')) > 0 THEN 
			(LEFT(ISNULL(Step5Time, '00:00'), CHARINDEX(':', ISNULL(Step5Time, '00:00')) - 1) * 60) + 
			RIGHT(ISNULL(Step5Time, '00:00'), LEN(ISNULL(Step5Time, '00:00')) - CHARINDEX(':', ISNULL(Step5Time, '00:00')))
		ELSE 0 END,
		StartTime
	), 120) AS Step6_StartTime,
	-- Step 6 End Time
	CONVERT(VARCHAR, DATEADD(
		SECOND,
		CASE WHEN CHARINDEX(':', ISNULL(Step1Time, '00:00')) > 0 THEN 
			(LEFT(ISNULL(Step1Time, '00:00'), CHARINDEX(':', ISNULL(Step1Time, '00:00')) - 1) * 60) + 
			RIGHT(ISNULL(Step1Time, '00:00'), LEN(ISNULL(Step1Time, '00:00')) - CHARINDEX(':', ISNULL(Step1Time, '00:00')))
		ELSE 0 END +

			(LEFT(ISNULL(Step2Time, '00:00'), CHARINDEX(':', ISNULL(Step2Time, '00:00')) - 1) * 60) + 
			RIGHT(ISNULL(Step2Time, '00:00'), LEN(ISNULL(Step2Time, '00:00')) - CHARINDEX(':', ISNULL(Step2Time, '00:00')))
		ELSE 0 END +
		CASE WHEN CHARINDEX(':', ISNULL(Step3Time, '00:00')) > 0 THEN 
			(LEFT(ISNULL(Step3Time, '00:00'), CHARINDEX(':', ISNULL(Step3Time, '00:00')) - 1) * 60) + 
			RIGHT(ISNULL(Step3Time, '00:00'), LEN(ISNULL(Step3Time, '00:00')) - CHARINDEX(':', ISNULL(Step3Time, '00:00')))
		ELSE 0 END +
		CASE WHEN CHARINDEX(':', ISNULL(Step4Time, '00:00')) > 0 THEN 
			(LEFT(ISNULL(Step4Time, '00:00'), CHARINDEX(':', ISNULL(Step4Time, '00:00')) - 1) * 60) + 
			RIGHT(ISNULL(Step4Time, '00:00'), LEN(ISNULL(Step4Time, '00:00')) - CHARINDEX(':', ISNULL(Step4Time, '00:00')))
		ELSE 0 END +
		CASE WHEN CHARINDEX(':', ISNULL(Step5Time, '00:00')) > 0 THEN 
			(LEFT(ISNULL(Step5Time, '00:00'), CHARINDEX(':', ISNULL(Step5Time, '00:00')) - 1) * 60) + 
			RIGHT(ISNULL(Step5Time, '00:00'), LEN(ISNULL(Step5Time, '00:00')) - CHARINDEX(':', ISNULL(Step5Time, '00:00')))
		ELSE 0 END +
		CASE WHEN CHARINDEX(':', ISNULL(Step6Time, '00:00')) > 0 THEN 
			(LEFT(ISNULL(Step6Time, '00:00'), CHARINDEX(':', ISNULL(Step6Time, '00:00')) - 1) * 60) + 
			RIGHT(ISNULL(Step6Time, '00:00'), LEN(ISNULL(Step6Time, '00:00')) - CHARINDEX(':', ISNULL(Step6Time, '00:00')))

tags.query:
SELECT Step1StartVol AS StepStartVol, Step1EndVol AS StepEndVol,
	-- Step 1 Start Time
	CONVERT(VARCHAR, StartTime, 120) AS Step_StartTime,
	-- Step 1 End Time
	CONVERT(VARCHAR, DATEADD(
		SECOND,
		CASE WHEN CHARINDEX(':', ISNULL(Step1Time, '00:00')) > 0 THEN 
			(LEFT(ISNULL(Step1Time, '00:00'), CHARINDEX(':', ISNULL(Step1Time, '00:00')) - 1) * 60) + 
			RIGHT(ISNULL(Step1Time, '00:00'), LEN(ISNULL(Step1Time, '00:00')) - CHARINDEX(':', ISNULL(Step1Time, '00:00')))
		ELSE 0 END,
		StartTime
	), 120) AS Step_EndTime,
	Step1Reason AS StepReason
FROM Charge_Data
WHERE ChargeNumber = {[.]../../Charge/Number}
tags.name: Step 1 Details

			(LEFT(ISNULL(Step1Time, '00:00'), CHARINDEX(':', ISNULL(Step1Time, '00:00')) - 1) * 60) + 
			RIGHT(ISNULL(Step1Time, '00:00'), LEN(ISNULL(Step1Time, '00:00')) - CHARINDEX(':', ISNULL(Step1Time, '00:00')))
		ELSE 0 END,
		StartTime
	), 120) AS Step2_StartTime,
	-- Step 2 End Time
	CONVERT(VARCHAR, DATEADD(
		SECOND,
		CASE WHEN CHARINDEX(':', ISNULL(Step1Time, '00:00')) > 0 THEN 
			(LEFT(ISNULL(Step1Time, '00:00'), CHARINDEX(':', ISNULL(Step1Time, '00:00')) - 1) * 60) + 
			RIGHT(ISNULL(Step1Time, '00:00'), LEN(ISNULL(Step1Time, '00:00')) - CHARINDEX(':', ISNULL(Step1Time, '00:00')))
		ELSE 0 END +

eventScripts.script:
if not initialChange:
        try:
            # Read the step tag to determine which row to update (Step 1 corresponds to Row 0, Step 2 to Row 1, etc.)
            step_value = system.tag.readBlocking(["[.]Step"])[0].value

            # Get the current dataset from the 'Active Recipe' tag
            dataset = system.tag.readBlocking(["[.]../../Charge/Active Recipe"])[0].value

            # Check if the dataset has any rows
            if dataset.rowCount == 0:
#                system.util.getLogger("TagChangeScript").warn("No rows in the dataset")
                return

            # If step is 0, write a "0" to the specified column and row and exit
            if step_value == 0:
                row_to_update = 0  # Update the first row (row index 0) for Step 0
                column_to_update = 6  # Assuming you want to update column 6

                # Update the dataset with "0" in the specified row and column
                updatedDataset = system.dataset.setValue(dataset, row_to_update, column_to_update, "0")

                # Write the updated dataset back to the 'Active Recipe' tag
                system.tag.writeBlocking(["[.]../../Charge/Active Recipe"], [updatedDataset])

                # Log the update
#                system.util.getLogger("TagChangeScript").info("Step is 0, wrote '0' to row {} in column {}.".format(row_to_update, column_to_update))
